name: pi-research
description: Repo-local Kimi research agent for provenance briefs, fidelity critiques, and implementation handoff prep.

interface.shortDescription: Kimi-powered research briefs for provenance and visual fidelity work.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local research agent that uses NVIDIA NIM with Kimi K2.5 for provenance audits, reference packs, visual fidelity critiques, and implementation brief generation. It is research-only and does not modify product code directly.
defaultPrompt: Prepare an iPod finish provenance audit.
Critique the current UI for visual fidelity.
